zh.lifeSummary: 當Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia於1183年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog29歲，母親Jenet verch Elidur14歲。他和Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1288年在英國威爾斯享年105歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia于1183年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog29岁，母亲Jenet verch Elidur14岁。他和Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1288年在英国威尔斯享年105岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gam
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Danish: possibly from a German noble name von Gamm from Mecklenburg (see Gamm ).
Indian (Karnataka): name of unexplained etymology found in the Koli people (a fishing community).

variants.name: Gamm
meanings: habitational name from Gamme, near Hamburg.
from a short form of an ancient Germanic personal name based on an element cognate with Old High German gaman ‘joy, fun, game’.

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Morgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Welsh Morcant , traditionally a boy's name. In Britain since the late 1990s the name has become equally popular as a girl's name, perhaps adopted with conscious reference to  King Arthur's  jealous stepsister  Morgan le Fay . Elsewhere in the English-speaking world, especially in North America, where it also enjoys considerable popularity, it is used predominantly for girls.

variants.name: Morcant
meanings: Traditional: composed of an unexplained first element + a second representing the Old Celtic element cant ‘circle; completion’.

en.lifeSummary: When Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia was born in 1183, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog, was 29 and his mother, Jenet verch Elidur, was 14. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan. He died in 1288, in Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 105.

fr.Baglan, Glamorgan, Wales: Baglan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia est né en 1183, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Jenet verch Elidur, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan. Il est décédé en 1288, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 105 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia 1183 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog 29 und seine Mutter Jenet verch Elidur 14. Er hatte mit Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1288 im Alter von 105 Jahren in Wales, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia è nato il nel 1183 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Jenet verch Elidur, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan. Morì nel 1288, nel Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 105 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Walliaが1183年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradogは29歳，母Jenet verch Elidurは14歳であった。彼はElen Verch Hwyel Vychanとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1288年にイギリスウェールズで105歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia(이)가 1183년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Jenet verch Elidur(은)는 14세였다. 그는 Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1288년 영국 웨일스에서 105세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia nasceu em 1183, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Jenet verch Elidur, tinha 14 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia родился в 1183 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Jenet verch Elidur, 14. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan. Он умер в 1288 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 105 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Morgan Fychan ap Morgan Gam Lord of Avan Wallia nació en 1183, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Morgan Gam ap Morgan of Caradog, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Jenet verch Elidur, tenía 14 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Elen Verch Hwyel Vychan. Murió en 1288, en Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 105 años.
